allow: Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/QINGDAO LINCAPS/QINGDAO Capwis/g' -e 's/Explore All LINCAPS Products/Explore All Capwis Products/g' -e 's/About LINCAPS/About Capwis/g' -e 's/LINCAPS delivers/Capwis delivers/g' -e 's/LINCAPS is committed/Capwis is committed/g' -e 's/As LINCAPS continues/As Capwis continues/g' -e 's/LINCAPS provides/Capwis provides/g' -e 's/LINCAPS aims/Capwis aims/g' -e 's/Why Partner With LINCAPS/Why Partner With Capwis/g' -e 's/Contact LINCAPS/Contact Capwis/g' -e 's/Partner with LINCAPS/Partner with Capwis/g' config/locales/en.yml)
Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/service: lincaps/service: capwis/g' -e 's|image: your-user/lincaps|image: your-user/capwis|g' -e 's/lincaps_storage/capwis_storage/g' config/deploy.yml)

Bash(sed -i '' -e 's/alt: "Lincaps Factory"/alt: "Capwis Factory"/g' -e 's/<!-- 为什么选择 LINCAPS?/<!-- 为什么选择 Capwis?/g' -e 's/LINCAPS provides partners/Capwis provides partners/g' -e 's/>LINCAPS · Qingdao</>Capwis · Qingdao</g' app/views/home/about.html.erb)
